steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank appears in: grouping authors into literary movements "encourages literary scholars to ______ subtleties." The next sentence is the decisive clue: scholars studying Hedge "may inadvertently overlook nuances" by focusing only on the most obvious traits. The blank must mean to overlook or treat as unimportant.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "discount": means to treat as unimportant or disregard, directly matching "overlook nuances" from the next sentence. ✓
  • "scrutinize": means to examine closely — the opposite of the passage's meaning; grouping authors into movements leads scholars away from careful attention to subtleties, not toward it. ✗
  • "magnify": means to enlarge or amplify — scholars overlooking subtleties are not making them larger; this word goes in the wrong direction. ✗
  • "denounce": means to publicly condemn — scholars are passively overlooking subtleties, not actively criticizing them; this introduces a hostile meaning absent from the passage. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
